        <frame id="1:97" name="Container" x="0" y="124.80000305175781" width="611" height="195.625">
          <text id="1:98" name="Founded in 2014 by Acharya Ashok, Bodhi School of Yoga was created with a simple yet powerful vision: to help people reconnect with themselves through yoga, wellness, and inner awareness. Over the years, Bodhi has evolved into more than a yoga school. It is a space where individuals cultivate balance, clarity, and deeper well-being, whether for personal transformation or as a meaningful path to becoming a yoga teacher. At the heart of the mission is the empowerment of women through yoga. " x="0" y="0" width="696" height="195" />

                  <text id="1:8340" name="The online 300-hour YTT improves a trainer's comprehension of core yoga principles and teachings covered in the RYT200 TTC worldwide yoga certification programme.                 <text id="1:8341" name="After completing this advanced course, you will be certified as a RYT300 international yoga trainer and will be able to launch a successful career." x="0" y="93" width="1274" height="27" />
                <text id="1:8342" name="This 300 Hour TTC offered by Bodhi School of Yoga is accredited and recognised by Yoga Alliance.           <frame id="1:8431" name="Container" x="0" y="24" width="908" height="36">
            <text id="1:8432" name="Certification of 300 Hour Yoga Teacher Training :" x="0" y="0" width="908" height="36" />
          </frame>
        </frame>
        <frame id="1:8433" name="Background" x="0" y="86" width="1346" height="236">
          <frame id="1:8434" name="Container" x="40" y="44.74150085449219" width="1129" height="141.09500122070312">
            <frame id="1:8435" name="Heading 3" x="0" y="0" width="1129" height="36">
              <text id="1:8436" name="Globally Recognised" x="0" y="0" width="1129" height="36" />
            </frame>
            <text id="1:8437" name="Becoming a Yoga Trainer entails dedicating oneself to the Yoga practise. It's all about putting Yoga's philosophy and expertise into practise on a daily basis. The goal is to become a powerful individual who, by their presence, emanates the Yoga philosophy. It is a road of bravery, devotion, and physical and mental self-discipline. The goal of the Level 3 Yoga Teacher Training Certification Course is to instil in pupils the spirit of a Yogi. This programme is suitable for active yoga practitioners, and upon completion, participants will get an international yoga teacher certification for RYT300" x="0" y="45.095001220703125" width="1129" height="96" />
          </frame>
        </frame>
      </frame>
    </frame>

    <frame id="1:8932" name="Founder Card" x="309" y="972" width="1301" height="473.9775085449219">
      <frame id="1:8933" name="Section founder" x="309" y="972" width="1301" height="473.9775085449219">
        <rounded-rectangle id="1:8934" name="Rectangle 161124059" x="832.8740844726562" y="0.0000139090607262915" width="684.6341552734375" height="605.637939453125" />
        <frame id="1:8935" name="Group 1171281800" x="60" y="0" width="1183" height="474">
          <frame id="1:8936" name="Group 1171281801" x="59.99980527313892" y="46.81248474121094" width="561.7510986328125" height="379.854248046875">
            <frame id="1:8937" name="Frame 1171281796" x="59.99980527313892" y="46.81248474121094" width="561.7510986328125" height="379.854248046875">
              <frame id="1:8938" name="Group 1171281799" x="0" y="0" width="341.3418273925781" height="72.6466064453125">
                <text id="1:8939" name="Founder & Yoga Guru" x="-0.00019472686108201742" y="-0.000014458102668868378" width="165.7946014404297" height="21" />
                <text id="1:8940" name="Ashok Vankineni" x="-0.00019472686108201742" y="20.646570205688477" width="341.3418273925781" height="52" />
              </frame>
              <frame id="1:8941" name="Frame 1171281795" x="0" y="93.12712097167969" width="561.7510986328125" height="286.7271423339844">
                <text id="1:8942" name=""Today's life is fast-paced and hectic, the ethos acquisitive, cynical and self-centred. In this scenario, to become a yoga teacher is a beautiful choice. It is a choice to not be cynical, to love society and be a force for good."" x="0" y="0" width="561.7510986328125" height="70.21888732910156" />
                <text id="1:8943" name="Ashok Vankineni, our guru, was a telecom engineer with an IIM MBA in his previous avatar. Highly successful, he worked all over the world, won a promotion a year and was very senior at a young age when he had a physical breakdown. Yoga healed him and started him on a new path." x="-0.00019472686108201742" y="82.89724731445312" width="561.7510986328125" height="104.35307312011719" />
                <text id="1:8944" name="He quit the corporate world as a GM in Tata Docomo to dedicate himself fully to yoga, wellness and healing. After studying yoga for many years under various gurus, Ashokji set up Bodhi Yoga to wake others out of their suffering and help them experience the bliss of healing through yoga." x="-0.00019472686108201742" y="199.92872619628906" width="561.7510986328125" height="78.99625396728516" />
              </frame>
            </frame>
          </frame>
          <rounded-rectangle id="1:8945" name="image 13" x="845" y="0" width="398" height="474" />
        </frame>
      </frame>
    </frame>

  <frame id="1:9681" name="About us" x="14700" y="7569" width="1920" height="5064">
    <frame id="353:11630" name="Testimonials" x="0" y="3499" width="1920" height="655">
      <rounded-rectangle id="1:9683" name="Rectangle 161124058" x="0" y="3499" width="1920" height="655" />
      <frame id="1:9684" name="Group 1171281832" x="240" y="3562" width="1441" height="499">
        <frame id="1:9685" name="Frame 1171281840" x="240" y="3562" width="1441" height="499">
          <frame id="1:9686" name="Frame 1171281037" x="481.5" y="0" width="478" height="76">
            <text id="1:9687" name="A Path to Wellness" x="162.5" y="0" width="153" height="17" />
            <text id="1:9688" name="What our clients say" x="0" y="23" width="478" height="53" />
          </frame>
          <frame id="1:9689" name="Frame 1171281839" x="0" y="124" width="1441" height="375">
            <frame id="1:9690" name="Group 1171281831" x="0" y="0" width="457" height="375">
              <rounded-rectangle id="1:9691" name="Rectangle 161124056" x="0" y="0" width="457" height="375" />
              <frame id="1:9692" name="Frame 1171281050" x="6" y="30" width="443" height="312">
                <ellipse id="1:9693" name="Ellipse 18" x="22" y="5.625" width="109" height="109" />
                <frame id="1:9694" name="HorizontalBorder" x="22" y="124.625" width="399" height="181.75">
                  <frame id="1:9695" name="Blockquote" x="0" y="23.030000686645508" width="399" height="119.72000122070312">
                    <text id="1:9696" name="“I came in to lose weight. I left able to teach a class — and a calmer person at home. The training is honest, and that's rare.”" x="0" y="0" width="399" height="119" />
                  </frame>
                  <frame id="1:9697" name="Cite" x="0" y="160.75" width="399" height="21">
                    <text id="1:9698" name="— Aanya, TTC Cohort 11. Now teaching in Goa." x="0" y="0" width="297" height="21" />
                  </frame>
                </frame>
              </frame>
            </frame>
            <frame id="1:9699" name="Group 1171281830" x="492" y="0" width="457" height="375">
              <rounded-rectangle id="1:9700" name="Rectangle 161124057" x="492" y="0" width="457" height="375" />
              <text id="1:9701" name="”" x="837" y="51" width="71" height="65" />
              <frame id="1:9702" name="Frame 1171281051" x="492" y="30" width="443" height="312">
                <ellipse id="1:9703" name="Ellipse 18" x="22" y="5.625" width="109" height="109" />
                <frame id="1:9704" name="HorizontalBorder" x="22" y="124.625" width="399" height="181.75">
                  <frame id="1:9705" name="Blockquote" x="0" y="23.030000686645508" width="399" height="119.72000122070312">
                    <text id="1:9706" name="“The back pain workshop did more in two days than two years of physiotherapy. I've recommended Bodhi to everyone I know.”" x="0" y="0" width="399" height="119" />
                  </frame>
                  <frame id="1:9707" name="Cite" x="0" y="160.75" width="399" height="21">
                    <text id="1:9708" name="— Ravi, workshop participant" x="0" y="0" width="188" height="21" />
                  </frame>
                </frame>
              </frame>
            </frame>
            <frame id="1:9709" name="Group 1171281829" x="984" y="0" width="457" height="375">
              <rounded-rectangle id="1:9710" name="Rectangle 161124058" x="984" y="0" width="457" height="375" />
              <ellipse id="1:9711" name="Ellipse 18" x="1013" y="44" width="109" height="109" />
              <frame id="1:9712" name="Blockquote" x="1013" y="187.02978515625" width="399" height="119.72000122070312">
                <text id="1:9713" name="“I practice with Bodhi online from Berlin. Six in the morning, India time. It's the most consistent thing in my week.”" x="0" y="0" width="399" height="119" />
              </frame>
              <frame id="1:9714" name="Cite" x="1013" y="324.75" width="399" height="21">
                <text id="1:9715" name="— Lena, online student, 2 years" x="0" y="0" width="203" height="21" />
              </frame>
              <text id="1:9716" name="”" x="1332" y="55" width="71" height="65" />
            </frame>
          </frame>
        </frame>
        <text id="1:9717" name="”" x="597" y="3739" width="71" height="65" />
      </frame>
    </frame>
    <frame id="353:11628" name="Hero section" x="0" y="0" width="1920" height="587">
      <rounded-rectangle id="1:9682" name="Rectangle 161124051" x="0" y="0" width="1920" height="587" />
      <frame id="1:9718" name="Mask group" x="659" y="183" width="603" height="260">
        <frame id="1:9719" name="Group 1171281759" x="659" y="183" width="603" height="260">
          <frame id="1:9720" name="Frame 1171281112" x="659" y="183" width="603" height="260">
            <frame id="1:9721" name="Frame 1171281111" x="0" y="0" width="603" height="186">
              <frame id="1:9722" name="Frame 1171281110" x="0" y="0" width="603" height="186">
                <text id="1:9723" name="About Bodhi School of Yoga" x="0" y="0" width="603" height="118" />
                <text id="1:9724" name="Every woman holds the power to heal, rise, and lead — and yoga is the path that makes this transformation real." x="0" y="132" width="603" height="54" />
              </frame>
            </frame>
            <frame id="1:9725" name="Button" x="207" y="212" width="189" height="48">
              <text id="1:9726" name="Join our classes" x="36.5" y="14" width="116" height="20" />
            </frame>
          </frame>
        </frame>
      </frame>
    </frame>
    <frame id="1:9727" name="What We Stand For" x="321" y="747.6748046875" width="1285" height="374.97344970703125">
      <frame id="1:9728" name="Frame 1171281818" x="321" y="747.6748046875" width="1285" height="374.97344970703125">
        <frame id="1:9729" name="Frame 1171281819" x="0" y="0" width="1285" height="374.97344970703125">
          <frame id="1:9730" name="Group 1171281813" x="354.5" y="0" width="576" height="72.97344970703125">
            <frame id="1:9731" name="Group 1171281863" x="354.5" y="0" width="576" height="72.97344970703125">
              <text id="1:9732" name="What We Stand For" x="552.5" y="0" width="179" height="19" />
              <text id="1:9733" name="Healing. Expert. Community." x="354.5" y="19.97344970703125" width="576" height="53" />
            </frame>
          </frame>
          <frame id="1:9734" name="Frame 1171281805" x="0" y="105.97344970703125" width="1285" height="269">
            <frame id="1:9735" name="pillar" x="0" y="0" width="412" height="269">
              <text id="1:9736" name="Healing" x="162.720703125" y="118.232421875" width="94.80677795410156" height="37" />
              <text id="1:9737" name="We are committed to bringing about physical, mental and emotional healing for everyperson in the world." x="47.00104522705078" y="155.4296875" width="317.9979553222656" height="72" />
              <frame id="1:9738" name="Mask group" x="172" y="33.9276123046875" width="67.14473724365234" height="67.14473724365234">
                <rounded-rectangle id="1:9739" name="image 18" x="172" y="33.9276123046875" width="67.14473724365234" height="67.14473724365234" />
                <rounded-rectangle id="1:9740" name="Rectangle 161124053" x="172" y="29.782894611358643" width="67.97368621826172" height="77.09210205078125" />
              </frame>
            </frame>
            <frame id="1:9741" name="pillar" x="436" y="0" width="413" height="269">
              <text id="1:9742" name="Expert" x="167.7080078125" y="118.232421875" width="84.47726440429688" height="37" />
              <text id="1:9743" name="We teach pure yoga and ayurveda. No remixes or reinterpretations. Hatha. Vinyasa. Yin. Take your pick." x="39.59873962402344" y="155.4296875" width="333.8024597167969" height="72" />
              <frame id="1:9744" name="Mask group" x="167" y="33.5" width="63" height="63">
                <rounded-rectangle id="1:9745" name="image 19" x="167" y="33.5" width="63" height="63" />
                <rounded-rectangle id="1:9746" name="Rectangle 161124053" x="161.19736862182617" y="29.355263233184814" width="74.60526275634766" height="82.06578826904297" />
              </frame>
            </frame>
            <frame id="1:9747" name="pillar" x="873" y="0" width="412" height="269">
              <text id="1:9748" name="Community" x="138.91796875" y="118.232421875" width="147.477294921875" height="37" />
              <text id="1:9749" name="We are a growing community of incredible variety. Age, sex, professions vary. The common thread? Love of healing and yoga." x="43.96484375" y="155.4296875" width="324.0605163574219" height="72" />
              <frame id="1:9750" name="Mask group" x="158" y="34.09869384765625" width="68.8026351928711" height="68.8026351928711">
                <rounded-rectangle id="1:9751" name="image 20" x="158" y="34.09869384765625" width="68.8026351928711" height="68.8026351928711" />
                <rounded-rectangle id="1:9752" name="Rectangle 161124053" x="154.6845703125" y="29.95416259765625" width="77.92105102539062" height="82.06578826904297" />
              </frame>
            </frame>
          </frame>
        </frame>
      </frame>
    </frame>
    <frame id="1:9756" name="Our Legacy" x="294" y="1242" width="1335.4293212890625" height="297">
      <frame id="1:9757" name="Group 1171281810" x="0" y="0" width="673" height="297">
        <frame id="1:9758" name="Group 1171281806" x="0" y="0" width="217" height="53">
          <text id="1:9759" name="Our Legacy" x="0" y="0" width="217" height="53" />
        </frame>
        <text id="1:9760" name="Yoga is an eternal gift to humanity — born in the sacred lands of Bharat thousands of years ago. It was created not only to nurture physical health but also to guide the soul towards clarity, compassion, and liberation. From ancient yoginis to present-day practitioners, women have always been an integral part of this legacy — as seekers, as teachers, and as torchbearers of transformation. At Bodhi School of Yoga, we carry forward this rich tradition with deep respect and a bold vision: to empower women through the timeless power of yoga. As time evolves, so do we — but the essence of yoga remains our unshakable root." x="0" y="66" width="673" height="231" />
      </frame>
      <frame id="1:9761" name="img-slot vision-img" x="808" y="0" width="527" height="297" />
    </frame>
    <frame id="1:9762" name="Our Present" x="294" y="1651" width="1164" height="263">
      <frame id="1:9763" name="img-slot vision-img" x="0" y="1" width="526" height="261" />
      <frame id="1:9764" name="Group 1171281807" x="638" y="0" width="526" height="263">
        <text id="1:9765" name="Our Present" x="638" y="0" width="230" height="53" />
        <text id="1:9766" name="We live in times of great progress—and profound pain. As the world rushes ahead, many are left overwhelmed by stress, burnout, and emotional disconnect. Women, especially, carry the weight of homes, careers, and expectations—all while seeking space to breathe and be. In a world that often forgets to pause, we teach women to reconnect—with themselves, with peace, and with purpose." x="638" y="61" width="526" height="202" />
      </frame>
    </frame>
    <frame id="1:9767" name="The Future we seek" x="294" y="2026" width="1335.4293212890625" height="261">
      <frame id="1:9768" name="Group 1171281807" x="0" y="27.8203125" width="636" height="205.359375">
        <text id="1:9769" name="The Future we seek" x="0" y="27.8203125" width="369" height="53" />
        <text id="1:9770" name="At Bodhi School of Yoga, we believe yoga is not just a practice—it is a lifeline. We believe that when a woman is empowered through yoga, her entire family, community, and future generations benefit. Our mission is to create a global sisterhood of women who are physically vibrant, mentally resilient, emotionally balanced, and spiritually connected." x="0" y="89.1796875" width="636" height="144" />
      </frame>
      <frame id="1:9771" name="img-slot vision-img" x="805" y="0" width="526" height="261" />
    </frame>
    <frame id="1:9773" name="Trainers" x="294" y="2399" width="1337" height="295">
      <frame id="1:9774" name="img-slot vision-img" x="0" y="0" width="526" height="295" />
      <frame id="1:9776" name="Group 1171281807" x="638" y="30.3203125" width="642" height="234.359375">
        <text id="1:9777" name="Trainers" x="638" y="30.3203125" width="155" height="53" />
        <text id="1:9778" name="At Bodhi School of Yoga, our trainers are not just instructors—they are dedicated disciples of the yogic lifestyle. Each trainer embodies the wisdom of traditional yoga, passionately guiding students toward physical vitality, mental clarity, and spiritual awakening. With deep-rooted discipline, compassion, and experience, they empower every learner to integrate yoga into daily life and walk the path of transformation with confidence." x="638" y="91.6796875" width="642" height="173" />
      </frame>
    </frame>
    <frame id="353:11629" name="Our Vision and Mission" x="292" y="2873" width="1337" height="452">
      <frame id="1:9780" name="Group 1171281808" x="292" y="2873" width="657" height="452">
        <rounded-rectangle id="1:9781" name="Rectangle 161124054" x="292" y="2873" width="657" height="452" />
        <frame id="1:9782" name="Group 1171281807" x="329" y="2902" width="495" height="381">
          <text id="1:9783" name="Our Vision" x="329" y="2902" width="170" height="53" />
          <text id="1:9784" name="By 2030, Bodhi School of Yoga envisions a powerful global network of 100,000 internationally certified yoga trainers—all of them women—spreading holistic well-being across the world. We are committed to nurturing a culture of consciousness, compassion, and connection, beginning at the heart of every home. As we guide women to step into their inner strength, we also empower yoga trainers to achieve financial freedom and personal fulfillment by offering advanced training, tools, and opportunities to grow. At Bodhi, we don’t just teach yoga—we awaken leaders, healers, and changemakers for a brighter, more balanced tomorrow." x="329" y="2966" width="495" height="317" />
        </frame>
      </frame>
      <frame id="1:9785" name="Group 1171281809" x="972" y="2873" width="657" height="452">
        <rounded-rectangle id="1:9786" name="Rectangle 161124055" x="972" y="2873" width="657" height="452" />
        <frame id="1:9787" name="Group 1171281807" x="1017" y="2902" width="563" height="352">
          <text id="1:9788" name="Our Mission" x="1017" y="2902" width="193" height="53" />
          <text id="1:9789" name="At Bodhi School of Yoga, our mission is to deliver comprehensive, inclusive, and heart-centered yoga education that empowers individuals—especially women—to lead vibrant, meaningful lives. We aim to cultivate a deep connection between body, mind, and soul, while nurturing emotional resilience, mental clarity, and spiritual growth. Through thoughtfully designed programs and personalized guidance, we help every student unlock their inner Shakti (power) and step confidently into their purpose. Whether your goal is personal healing or a rewarding career, Bodhi is your space to grow, transform, and thrive." x="1017" y="2966" width="563" height="288" />
        </frame>
      </frame>
    </frame>
